toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 實施、執行（計畫或政策）
toeic.example_en: The board decided to implement the new safety policy starting next quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 董事會決定從下一季開始實施新的安全政策。

toeic.example_en: The acquisition of the smaller firm will expand our market share significantly.
toeic.example_zh: 對這家小公司的收購將大幅擴展我們的市場佔有率。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 遵守、依從（常與 with 連用）
toeic.example_en: All employees must comply with the updated data protection regulations.
toeic.example_zh: 所有員工都必須遵守更新後的資料保護規定。

toeic.example_en: The company will reimburse you for any travel expenses incurred during the conference.
toeic.example_zh: 公司將報銷您在會議期間產生的所有差旅費用。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 分配、撥出（資源、預算）
toeic.example_en: The manager will allocate additional funds to the marketing department this year.
toeic.example_zh: 經理今年將撥出額外資金給行銷部門。

toeic.example_en: We had to postpone the product launch due to unexpected supply chain issues.
toeic.example_zh: 由於意外的供應鏈問題，我們不得不延期產品發表。

toeic.example_en: Ms. Tanaka will oversee the renovation of the downtown branch office.
toeic.example_zh: 田中女士將監督市中心分公司的整修工程。

toeic.example_en: Our sales team is meeting with several prospective clients next Monday.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的業務團隊下週一將與幾位潛在客戶會面。

toeic.example_en: Please review the agenda prior to attending tomorrow's meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 請在參加明天的會議之前先審閱議程。

toeic.example_en: I am writing regarding the invoice we received last week.
toeic.example_zh: 我來信是關於我們上週收到的那份發票。

toeic.example_en: Please designate one team member to handle customer inquiries during the trade show.
toeic.example_zh: 請指派一名團隊成員在貿易展期間處理客戶詢問。

toeic.example_en: The firm offers competitive benefits in order to retain top talent.
toeic.example_zh: 該公司提供具競爭力的福利以留住頂尖人才。

toeic.example_en: Either party may terminate this contract with thirty days written notice.
toeic.example_zh: 任何一方均可在三十天前以書面通知終止本合約。

toeic.example_en: Currency exchange rates tend to fluctuate during periods of economic uncertainty.
toeic.example_zh: 在經濟不確定的時期，匯率往往會波動。

toeic.example_en: The consultant prepared a comprehensive report on our operational efficiency.
toeic.example_zh: 顧問針對我們的營運效率準備了一份全面性的報告。

toeic.example_en: Attendance at the safety training session is mandatory for all factory workers.
toeic.example_zh: 所有工廠員工皆必須出席安全訓練課程。

toeic.example_en: We have selected a new vendor to supply our office stationery.
toeic.example_zh: 我們已選定一家新的供應商來提供辦公文具。

toeic.example_en: Please send the invoice to our accounting department by the end of the month.
toeic.example_zh: 請於月底前將發票寄送至我們的會計部門。

toeic.example_en: The travel agent emailed me a detailed itinerary for the Tokyo business trip.
toeic.example_zh: 旅行社業務員寄給我一份東京出差的詳細行程表。

toeic.example_en: The first item on today's agenda is the third-quarter sales report.
toeic.example_zh: 今天議程的第一項是第三季的銷售報告。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞/副詞) 每季的、按季度的
toeic.example_en: Shareholders receive a quarterly update on the company's financial performance.
toeic.example_zh: 股東每季都會收到公司財務表現的更新報告。

toeic.example_en: The new conference room can accommodate up to fifty participants.
toeic.example_zh: 新會議室最多可容納五十位與會者。

toeic.example_en: We need to expedite the shipment to meet the customer's deadline.
toeic.example_zh: 我們必須加速出貨以趕上客戶的期限。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 先決條件、必要條件
toeic.example_en: A bachelor's degree is a prerequisite for the senior analyst position.
toeic.example_zh: 學士學位是擔任資深分析師職位的先決條件。

toeic.example_en: Please indicate the primary beneficiary on your insurance enrollment form.
toeic.example_zh: 請在您的保險加保表上註明主要受益人。

toeic.example_en: Any disputes shall fall under the jurisdiction of the courts of New York.
toeic.example_zh: 任何爭議將歸紐約法院管轄。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 可扣除的；(名詞) 自付額
toeic.example_en: Business meal expenses may be tax deductible under certain conditions.
toeic.example_zh: 在特定條件下，商務餐費可能是可抵稅的。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 前提；(複數 premises) 房屋、營業場所
toeic.example_en: Smoking is strictly prohibited on the company premises.
toeic.example_zh: 公司營業場所內嚴禁吸菸。

toeic.example_en: I am writing on behalf of our CEO to confirm the meeting details.
toeic.example_zh: 我謹代表執行長來信確認會議細節。

toeic.example_en: In light of recent budget cuts, we will postpone the office renovation.
toeic.example_zh: 鑑於最近的預算削減，我們將延後辦公室整修工程。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 待決的、未決定的；(介系詞) 直到
toeic.example_en: Your application is still pending review by the human resources department.
toeic.example_zh: 您的申請仍待人資部門審查中。

toeic.example_en: With regard to your proposal, the committee will respond within two weeks.
toeic.example_zh: 關於您的提案，委員會將在兩週內回覆。

toeic.example_en: All travel arrangements are subject to manager approval.
toeic.example_zh: 所有差旅安排都須經主管核准。

toeic.example_en: Attendance at the annual shareholder meeting was higher than expected.
toeic.example_zh: 年度股東大會的出席率高於預期。

toeic.example_en: We anticipate strong demand for the new product during the holiday season.
toeic.example_zh: 我們預期新產品在假期期間將有強勁的需求。

toeic.example_en: Each applicant must submit a resume and two references.
toeic.example_zh: 每位應徵者都必須繳交履歷與兩份推薦信。

toeic.example_en: I would like to schedule an appointment with the dental clinic for next Tuesday.
toeic.example_zh: 我想預約下週二到牙科診所看診。

toeic.example_en: The technicians will assemble the new equipment first thing tomorrow morning.
toeic.example_zh: 技術人員將於明天一早組裝新設備。

toeic.example_en: Only the department head is authorized to approve overtime payments.
toeic.example_zh: 只有部門主管有權批准加班費。

toeic.example_en: Complimentary beverages will be served throughout the conference.
toeic.example_zh: 會議期間將全程提供免費飲料。

toeic.example_en: The merger will be mutually beneficial for both companies involved.
toeic.example_zh: 這次合併對相關的兩家公司都將互利有益。

toeic.example_en: Our company plans to open a new branch in Singapore next year.
toeic.example_zh: 我們公司計畫明年在新加坡開設新分公司。

toeic.example_en: The hiring committee selected three candidates for the final interview.
toeic.example_zh: 招聘委員會選出三名候選人進入最終面試。

toeic.example_en: The factory is currently operating at full capacity to meet rising demand.
toeic.example_zh: 工廠目前正以全產能運轉以滿足不斷上升的需求。

toeic.example_en: I would like to introduce my colleague from the marketing department.
toeic.example_zh: 我想介紹一下我來自行銷部門的同事。

toeic.example_en: Many employees prefer to work from home to avoid the long daily commute.
toeic.example_zh: 許多員工偏好在家工作以避免每天漫長的通勤。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 免費贈送的；讚美的
toeic.example_en: Hotel guests receive a complimentary breakfast each morning.
toeic.example_zh: 飯店住客每天早上可享用免費早餐。

toeic.example_en: After hours of negotiation, both sides finally reached a compromise.
toeic.example_zh: 經過數小時的協商，雙方終於達成妥協。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 進行、執行；(名詞) 行為
toeic.example_en: The research team will conduct a survey on customer satisfaction.
toeic.example_zh: 研究團隊將進行一項關於顧客滿意度的調查。

toeic.example_en: Our CEO will deliver the keynote speech at next month's industry conference.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的執行長將在下個月的產業會議上發表主題演說。

toeic.example_en: Written consent from the supervisor is required before any data is shared.
toeic.example_zh: 在分享任何資料之前，需要主管的書面同意。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 相當大的、可觀的
toeic.example_en: The new advertising campaign generated a considerable increase in sales.
toeic.example_zh: 新的廣告活動帶來了相當可觀的銷售成長。

toeic.example_en: Please consult the user manual before operating the photocopier.
toeic.example_zh: 操作影印機之前，請先參閱使用手冊。

toeic.example_en: Both parties signed the contract during the meeting yesterday.
toeic.example_zh: 雙方在昨天的會議中簽署了合約。

toeic.example_en: Every team member is expected to contribute ideas during brainstorming sessions.
toeic.example_zh: 在腦力激盪會議中，每位團隊成員都應提出想法。

toeic.example_en: Please let me know a convenient time for our phone interview.
toeic.example_zh: 請告訴我一個方便進行電話面試的時間。

toeic.example_en: The event coordinator will be responsible for managing the venue and catering.
toeic.example_zh: 活動統籌人將負責管理場地與餐飲事宜。

toeic.example_en: The contract documents were sent by overnight courier this morning.
toeic.example_zh: 合約文件已於今早透過隔夜快遞寄出。

toeic.example_en: Please refer to the current price list when preparing the quotation.
toeic.example_zh: 準備報價單時，請參考目前的價目表。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 截止日期、最後期限
toeic.example_en: The deadline for submitting expense reports is the fifth of each month.
toeic.example_zh: 繳交費用報告的截止日期為每月五日。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 委派、授權；(名詞) 代表
toeic.example_en: Effective managers delegate routine tasks to their team members.
toeic.example_zh: 有效率的主管會將例行工作委派給團隊成員。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 故意的、深思熟慮的；(動詞) 商議
toeic.example_en: The committee will deliberate the proposal before making a final decision.
toeic.example_zh: 委員會將會仔細商議該提案後再做出最終決定。

toeic.example_en: The sales representative will demonstrate the new software at the trade show.
toeic.example_zh: 業務代表將在貿易展上示範新軟體。

toeic.example_en: The shuttle bus will depart from the hotel lobby promptly at 8 a.m.
toeic.example_zh: 接駁巴士將於早上八點準時從飯店大廳出發。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 訂金、存款；(動詞) 存入
toeic.example_en: A 20 percent deposit is required to confirm your booking.
toeic.example_zh: 需支付百分之二十的訂金以確認您的預訂。

toeic.example_en: Bali has become a popular destination for corporate retreats.
toeic.example_zh: 峇里島已成為企業員工旅遊熱門的目的地。

toeic.example_en: She devoted years of effort to building the firm's reputation in Asia.
toeic.example_zh: 她投入多年心力打造公司在亞洲的聲譽。

toeic.example_en: The marketing team will distribute samples at the upcoming exhibition.
toeic.example_zh: 行銷團隊將在即將到來的展覽中分發樣品。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 文件；(動詞) 記錄
toeic.example_en: Please attach the relevant documents to your application form.
toeic.example_zh: 請將相關文件附加在您的申請表上。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 草稿；(動詞) 起草
toeic.example_en: I have prepared a draft of the proposal for your review.
toeic.example_zh: 我已準備好提案的草稿供您審閱。

toeic.example_en: The flight was delayed due to severe weather conditions.
toeic.example_zh: 由於天候惡劣，班機延誤了。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 合格的、有資格的
toeic.example_en: Employees are eligible for the bonus after completing one year of service.
toeic.example_zh: 員工在服務滿一年後即有資格領取獎金。

toeic.example_en: The company is about to embark on an ambitious expansion plan.
toeic.example_zh: 公司即將展開一項雄心勃勃的擴張計畫。

toeic.example_en: All employees are required to wear identification badges in the building.
toeic.example_zh: 所有員工在大樓內都必須佩戴識別證。

toeic.example_en: Several celebrities have endorsed the brand's new fragrance line.
toeic.example_zh: 多位名人為該品牌新推出的香水系列代言。

toeic.example_en: You can enroll in the leadership training program through the HR portal.
toeic.example_zh: 您可以透過人資入口網站註冊領導力訓練課程。

toeic.example_en: Please ensure that all forms are completed before submitting them.
toeic.example_zh: 請確保所有表格都已填妥再行繳交。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 使有資格、給予權利
toeic.example_en: This membership card entitles you to a 15 percent discount at all branches.
toeic.example_zh: 這張會員卡讓您在所有分店都享有百分之十五的折扣。

toeic.example_en: The laboratory equipment must be inspected on a monthly basis.
toeic.example_zh: 實驗室設備必須每月進行檢查。

toeic.example_en: The company was established in 1985 and now operates in twenty countries.
toeic.example_zh: 公司成立於 1985 年，目前在二十個國家營運。

toeic.example_en: Supervisors evaluate employee performance twice a year.
toeic.example_zh: 主管每年評估員工績效兩次。

toeic.example_en: Sales for the third quarter exceeded our initial expectations.
toeic.example_zh: 第三季的銷售額超出了我們最初的預期。

toeic.example_en: Members enjoy exclusive access to the executive lounge at the airport.
toeic.example_zh: 會員可獨家使用機場的貴賓休息室。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞/動詞) 免除的；豁免
toeic.example_en: Non-profit organizations are exempt from certain federal taxes.
toeic.example_zh: 非營利組織可豁免某些聯邦稅。

toeic.example_en: Our firm plans to expand its operations into Southeast Asia next year.
toeic.example_zh: 我們公司計畫明年將業務擴展到東南亞。

toeic.example_en: All travel expenses must be documented with original receipts.
toeic.example_zh: 所有差旅費用都必須以正本收據作為憑證。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 專業知識、專門技術
toeic.example_en: We hired a consultant with expertise in international tax law.
toeic.example_zh: 我們聘請了一位具國際稅法專業的顧問。

toeic.example_en: The team requested a one-week extension to complete the report.
toeic.example_zh: 團隊要求延期一週以完成報告。

toeic.example_en: The new manufacturing facility will create over 200 jobs in the region.
toeic.example_zh: 新的製造廠將為該地區創造超過兩百個工作機會。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 可行的、行得通的
toeic.example_en: Engineers are studying whether the proposal is technically feasible.
toeic.example_zh: 工程師正在研究該提案在技術上是否可行。

toeic.example_en: The accounting team prepares financial statements at the end of every quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 會計團隊在每季結束時編製財務報表。

toeic.example_en: Could you please forward this email to the entire sales team?
toeic.example_zh: 可以請您將這封電子郵件轉寄給整個業務團隊嗎？

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞/名詞) 創始的；成立
toeic.example_en: The founding partners still serve on the board of directors.
toeic.example_zh: 創始合夥人們仍在董事會中任職。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 頻繁的；(動詞) 常去
toeic.example_en: Frequent flyers can earn bonus miles by booking through our website.
toeic.example_zh: 常客旅客可透過我們的網站訂票賺取紅利哩程。

toeic.example_en: The supplier was unable to fulfill the order on time.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商無法準時履行訂單。

toeic.example_en: The startup secured additional funding from a venture capital firm.
toeic.example_zh: 這家新創公司從一家創投公司取得了額外的資金。

toeic.example_en: We need to gather more data before drawing any conclusions.
toeic.example_zh: 在做出任何結論之前，我們需要收集更多資料。

toeic.example_en: The new website is expected to generate substantial online traffic.
toeic.example_zh: 新網站預計將帶來可觀的線上流量。

toeic.example_en: We plan to hire ten new engineers before the end of the year.
toeic.example_zh: 我們計畫在年底前聘用十名新工程師。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 主辦；(名詞) 主人
toeic.example_en: Our city will host the international trade conference this autumn.
toeic.example_zh: 本市今秋將主辦國際貿易會議。

toeic.example_en: The audit helped identify several areas for cost reduction.
toeic.example_zh: 這次稽核協助找出了幾個可降低成本的領域。

toeic.example_en: The defective products were recalled with immediate effect.
toeic.example_zh: 瑕疵產品已立即生效召回。

toeic.example_en: The company offers performance-based incentives to its sales staff.
toeic.example_zh: 公司提供業務人員績效獎勵。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 包含的、含全部費用的
toeic.example_en: The package price is inclusive of breakfast and airport transfers.
toeic.example_zh: 套裝價格包含早餐及機場接送費用。

toeic.example_en: Recent figures indicate a steady growth in consumer spending.
toeic.example_zh: 近期數據顯示消費支出穩定成長。

toeic.example_en: The automotive industry has been heavily impacted by chip shortages.
toeic.example_zh: 汽車產業深受晶片短缺的影響。

toeic.example_en: Our initial estimate of project costs proved to be too low.
toeic.example_zh: 我們對專案成本的初步估算後來證明太低了。

toeic.example_en: Several customers have inquired about the availability of the new model.
toeic.example_zh: 已有多位客戶詢問新型號的供貨情況。

toeic.example_en: Technicians will install the security system over the weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 技術人員將在週末安裝保全系統。

toeic.example_en: She completed a six-month internship at an investment bank.
toeic.example_zh: 她在一家投資銀行完成了為期六個月的實習。

toeic.example_en: Warehouse staff conduct an inventory count at the end of each month.
toeic.example_zh: 倉庫員工每月底會進行一次庫存盤點。

toeic.example_en: Diversifying your investment portfolio helps reduce overall risk.
toeic.example_zh: 分散您的投資組合有助於降低整體風險。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 議題、問題；(動詞) 發行
toeic.example_en: The supervisor will address the issue of overtime pay at the next meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 主管將在下次會議上處理加班費的議題。

toeic.example_en: The company will launch its new smartphone in early September.
toeic.example_zh: 該公司將於九月初推出新款智慧型手機。

toeic.example_en: The designer redesigned the layout of the company brochure.
toeic.example_zh: 設計師重新設計了公司簡介手冊的版面配置。

toeic.example_en: The company carries insurance to protect against product liability claims.
toeic.example_zh: 公司投保了保險以防範產品責任索賠。

toeic.example_en: You will need a valid driver's license to operate the company vehicle.
toeic.example_zh: 您需要有效的駕照才能駕駛公司車輛。

toeic.example_en: Our headquarters is located in the financial district of the city.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的總部位於市中心的金融區。

toeic.example_en: The factory manufactures components for several major automobile brands.
toeic.example_zh: 該工廠為多個主要汽車品牌製造零組件。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞/名詞) 最大的、最高的
toeic.example_en: Each presentation is limited to a maximum of fifteen minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 每場簡報的時間最長為十五分鐘。

toeic.example_en: The merger of the two companies created the largest retailer in the country.
toeic.example_zh: 兩家公司的合併造就了該國最大的零售商。

toeic.example_en: We may need to modify the contract terms before signing.
toeic.example_zh: 我們可能需要在簽約前修改合約條款。

toeic.example_en: Managers monitor production levels on a daily basis.
toeic.example_zh: 經理每天監控生產水準。

toeic.example_en: Our legal team will negotiate the terms of the partnership agreement.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的法務團隊將協商合作協議的條款。

toeic.example_en: Please notify the receptionist as soon as your client arrives.
toeic.example_zh: 您的客戶一抵達時，請立即通知接待員。

toeic.example_en: The new tenant will occupy the third floor starting next month.
toeic.example_zh: 新房客將從下個月開始進駐三樓。

toeic.example_en: This position offers excellent opportunities for career advancement.
toeic.example_zh: 這個職位提供絕佳的職涯發展機會。

toeic.example_en: We are still waiting for the outcome of the merger negotiations.
toeic.example_zh: 我們仍在等待合併談判的結果。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 傑出的；未付清的
toeic.example_en: Please settle the outstanding balance by the end of this week.
toeic.example_zh: 請在本週末前結清未付款項。

toeic.example_en: The director gave a brief overview of the company's annual goals.
toeic.example_zh: 總監簡要概述了公司的年度目標。

toeic.example_en: All staff are encouraged to participate in the wellness program.
toeic.example_zh: 鼓勵全體員工參與健康促進計畫。

toeic.example_en: From a financial perspective, the project does not seem viable.
toeic.example_zh: 從財務角度來看，這個專案似乎不可行。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 與……有關（常與 to 連用）
toeic.example_en: The new policy pertains to all part-time and full-time employees.
toeic.example_zh: 這項新政策適用於所有兼職與全職員工。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 保險費；(形容詞) 高級的
toeic.example_en: Customers are willing to pay a premium for high-quality service.
toeic.example_zh: 顧客願意為高品質的服務支付額外費用。

toeic.example_en: She delivered an impressive presentation to the board of directors.
toeic.example_zh: 她向董事會做了一場令人印象深刻的簡報。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 主要的；(名詞) 校長、本金
toeic.example_en: The principal reason for the delay was a shortage of raw materials.
toeic.example_zh: 延誤的主要原因是原料短缺。

toeic.example_en: Once the contract is signed, we can proceed with the installation.
toeic.example_zh: 合約一旦簽訂，我們便可繼續進行安裝工作。

toeic.example_en: The position requires someone proficient in spreadsheet software.
toeic.example_zh: 該職位需要精通試算表軟體的人才。

toeic.example_en: Company policy prohibits employees from accepting expensive gifts from clients.
toeic.example_zh: 公司政策禁止員工收受客戶昂貴的禮物。

toeic.example_en: She was recently promoted to senior account manager.
toeic.example_zh: 她最近被晉升為資深客戶經理。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 迅速的；(動詞) 促使
toeic.example_en: Thank you for your prompt response to our inquiry.
toeic.example_zh: 感謝您對我們詢問的迅速回覆。

toeic.example_en: We can deliver the goods on Friday provided that the order is confirmed today.
toeic.example_zh: 只要訂單今天確認，我們就可以在週五出貨。

toeic.example_en: Customers can return any purchase within thirty days for a full refund.
toeic.example_zh: 顧客可以在三十天內退回任何購買的商品並獲得全額退款。

toeic.example_en: Only candidates with three years of experience qualify for this position.
toeic.example_zh: 只有具備三年經驗的應徵者才符合該職位的資格。

toeic.example_en: Please complete the customer satisfaction questionnaire before leaving.
toeic.example_zh: 離開前請填寫顧客滿意度問卷。

toeic.example_en: Please retain your receipt as proof of purchase.
toeic.example_zh: 請保留您的收據作為購買證明。

toeic.example_en: The CEO recognized the team for their outstanding contributions this year.
toeic.example_zh: 執行長表彰了該團隊本年度的傑出貢獻。

toeic.example_en: I would highly recommend this hotel for business travelers.
toeic.example_zh: 我會強力推薦這家飯店給商務旅客。

toeic.example_en: The firm plans to recruit twenty new graduates this spring.
toeic.example_zh: 這家公司計畫在今年春季招聘二十名應屆畢業生。

toeic.example_en: The store offers a full refund for unopened merchandise.
toeic.example_zh: 本店未開封商品提供全額退款。

toeic.example_en: Please direct any related questions to the customer service team.
toeic.example_zh: 任何相關問題請洽客戶服務團隊。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 相關的、有關聯的
toeic.example_en: Please attach all relevant documentation to your application.
toeic.example_zh: 請將所有相關文件附在您的申請書中。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 可靠的、值得信賴的
toeic.example_en: We need a reliable supplier who can meet tight deadlines.
toeic.example_zh: 我們需要一家可靠的供應商來達成緊迫的交期。

toeic.example_en: The company will relocate its headquarters to a larger building next year.
toeic.example_zh: 公司將於明年將總部搬遷至較大的建築物中。

toeic.example_en: May I remind you that the deadline is this Friday?
toeic.example_zh: 提醒您一下，截止日期是這週五。

toeic.example_en: The lobby will be closed while we renovate the reception area.
toeic.example_zh: 我們整修接待區期間，大廳將會封閉。

toeic.example_en: We need to replace the broken printer in the conference room.
toeic.example_zh: 我們需要更換會議室裡那台壞掉的印表機。

toeic.example_en: Your request for vacation leave has been approved.
toeic.example_zh: 您的休假申請已獲核准。

toeic.example_en: All visitors are required to sign in at the front desk.
toeic.example_zh: 所有訪客都必須在櫃台簽到。

toeic.example_en: I would like to make a dinner reservation for six people at 7 p.m.
toeic.example_zh: 我想預訂晚上七點六人的晚餐。

toeic.example_en: After ten years with the firm, he decided to resign and start his own business.
toeic.example_zh: 在公司服務十年後，他決定辭職並自行創業。

toeic.example_en: Customer service representatives are trained to resolve complaints quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 客服代表受過訓練，能夠迅速解決客訴問題。

toeic.example_en: Please respond to this email by the end of the business day.
toeic.example_zh: 請於本日下班前回覆這封電子郵件。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 零售；零售的
toeic.example_en: The new product will be available at retail stores nationwide next month.
toeic.example_zh: 這項新產品將於下個月在全國零售商店上市。

toeic.example_en: Mr. Chen plans to retire at the end of next year after forty years of service.
toeic.example_zh: 陳先生計畫在服務四十年後於明年底退休。

toeic.example_en: Annual revenue grew by twelve percent compared to last year.
toeic.example_zh: 年度營收較去年成長了百分之十二。

toeic.example_en: The author needed to revise the manuscript before publication.
toeic.example_zh: 作者必須在出版前修訂手稿。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 樣品、樣本；(動詞) 取樣
toeic.example_en: Visitors can request a free sample of the new skincare product.
toeic.example_zh: 訪客可以索取新護膚產品的免費樣品。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 取得、確保；(形容詞) 安全的
toeic.example_en: The firm managed to secure a major contract with the government.
toeic.example_zh: 該公司成功取得了一份與政府簽訂的重大合約。

toeic.example_en: Both parties hope to settle the dispute without going to court.
toeic.example_zh: 雙方都希望不必上法庭就能解決爭議。

toeic.example_en: The next shipment of office supplies is scheduled to arrive on Thursday.
toeic.example_zh: 下一批辦公用品預計於週四送達。

toeic.example_en: There has been a significant improvement in productivity since the upgrade.
toeic.example_zh: 自從升級以來，生產力有了顯著的提升。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 明確指出、具體說明
toeic.example_en: Please specify your preferred delivery date in the order form.
toeic.example_zh: 請在訂單上明確註明您希望的送貨日期。

toeic.example_en: Our company will sponsor the local marathon event again this year.
toeic.example_zh: 我們公司今年將再次贊助當地的馬拉松活動。

toeic.example_en: Please review your monthly bank statement carefully for any errors.
toeic.example_zh: 請仔細檢查您的每月銀行對帳單是否有任何錯誤。

toeic.example_en: The two firms formed a strategic alliance to enter the European market.
toeic.example_zh: 這兩家公司結成策略聯盟以進軍歐洲市場。

toeic.example_en: Applications must be submitted no later than May 30.
toeic.example_zh: 申請書必須於五月三十日前繳交。

toeic.example_en: Good managers communicate clearly with their subordinates.
toeic.example_zh: 優秀的管理者會與部屬清楚地溝通。

toeic.example_en: You can subscribe to our weekly newsletter through the website.
toeic.example_zh: 您可以透過網站訂閱我們的每週電子報。

toeic.example_en: Mr. Park will substitute for the regular trainer this week.
toeic.example_zh: 本週將由朴先生代理原本的講師。

toeic.example_en: Please report any safety concerns to your immediate supervisor.
toeic.example_zh: 如有任何安全疑慮，請向您的直屬主管反映。

toeic.example_en: We have built strong relationships with suppliers across Asia.
toeic.example_zh: 我們與全亞洲的供應商建立了穩固的關係。

toeic.example_en: The company supplements employee salaries with quarterly bonuses.
toeic.example_zh: 公司以每季獎金補充員工的薪資。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 剩餘、過剩的
toeic.example_en: The factory has a surplus of inventory that needs to be sold quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 工廠有過剩的庫存需要盡快出清。

toeic.example_en: The recent survey revealed that 80 percent of customers are satisfied.
toeic.example_zh: 最近的調查顯示百分之八十的顧客感到滿意。

toeic.example_en: It is difficult to sustain such rapid growth in a competitive market.
toeic.example_zh: 在競爭激烈的市場中很難維持如此快速的成長。

toeic.example_en: The hostile takeover bid was rejected by the board of directors.
toeic.example_zh: 敵意收購的提案遭到董事會否決。

toeic.example_en: New tariffs on imported steel will affect manufacturing costs.
toeic.example_zh: 新的鋼鐵進口關稅將影響製造成本。

toeic.example_en: We hired several temporary workers for the holiday shopping season.
toeic.example_zh: 我們為假期購物旺季雇用了幾名臨時工。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 暫定的、試驗性的
toeic.example_en: The tentative date for the launch event is November 12.
toeic.example_zh: 發表會的暫定日期為十一月十二日。

toeic.example_en: Please review the terms of the agreement before signing.
toeic.example_zh: 請在簽署前仔細閱讀協議的條款。

toeic.example_en: Our company will not tolerate any form of workplace harassment.
toeic.example_zh: 我們公司絕不容忍任何形式的職場騷擾。

toeic.example_en: Online transactions are protected by advanced encryption technology.
toeic.example_zh: 線上交易受到先進加密技術的保護。

toeic.example_en: The package was damaged in transit and needs to be replaced.
toeic.example_zh: 包裹在運送途中受損，需要更換。

toeic.example_en: The data is transmitted to our server every five minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 資料每五分鐘傳輸至我們的伺服器一次。

toeic.example_en: The turnout for the product demonstration exceeded our expectations.
toeic.example_zh: 產品展示會的出席人數超出了我們的預期。

toeic.example_en: Our ultimate goal is to become the market leader in renewable energy.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的最終目標是成為再生能源的市場領導者。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 一致同意的、無異議的
toeic.example_en: The board reached a unanimous decision to acquire the smaller company.
toeic.example_zh: 董事會無異議通過收購這家小公司的決議。

toeic.example_en: We must address the underlying causes of declining productivity.
toeic.example_zh: 我們必須處理生產力下降的根本原因。

toeic.example_en: The firm will undertake a major review of its operating procedures.
toeic.example_zh: 該公司將著手對其營運程序進行一次重大檢討。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞/名詞) 更新、最新消息
toeic.example_en: Please update the client database with the latest contact information.
toeic.example_zh: 請以最新的聯絡資訊更新客戶資料庫。

toeic.example_en: The IT department will upgrade all office computers next weekend.
toeic.example_zh: 資訊部門將於下週末升級所有辦公室的電腦。

toeic.example_en: I need an urgent reply regarding the contract terms.
toeic.example_zh: 我需要關於合約條款的緊急回覆。

toeic.example_en: There is currently a vacancy in our marketing team for an entry-level analyst.
toeic.example_zh: 我們行銷團隊目前有一個初階分析師的職缺。

toeic.example_en: The hotel ballroom is the perfect venue for our annual gala.
toeic.example_zh: 飯店宴會廳是我們年度晚宴的最佳場地。

toeic.example_en: Please verify the shipping address before processing the order.
toeic.example_zh: 處理訂單前請先核實送貨地址。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 至關重要的、必要的
toeic.example_en: Effective communication is vital to the success of any project.
toeic.example_zh: 有效的溝通對任何專案的成功都至關重要。

toeic.example_en: Each guest will receive a voucher for a complimentary meal.
toeic.example_zh: 每位來賓都將獲得一張免費餐點兌換券。

toeic.example_en: All electronic products come with a two-year warranty.
toeic.example_zh: 所有電子產品都附有兩年的保固。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 批發、批發的
toeic.example_en: We purchase office supplies at wholesale prices to reduce costs.
toeic.example_zh: 我們以批發價格採購辦公用品以降低成本。

toeic.example_en: The candidate decided to withdraw her application after receiving another offer.
toeic.example_zh: 在收到另一份工作邀約後，該應徵者決定撤回申請。

toeic.example_en: The firm may withhold payment until the work is satisfactorily completed.
toeic.example_zh: 公司可能會扣留款項直到工作令人滿意地完成為止。

toeic.example_en: Reserve the huddle room for small group discussions of two to four people.
toeic.example_zh: 預約小型會議室供二至四人的小組討論使用。

toeic.example_en: The boardroom is used for executive meetings and major client presentations.
toeic.example_zh: 董事會議室用於高階主管會議與重要客戶簡報。

toeic.example_en: Please book the conference room at least one day in advance.
toeic.example_zh: 請至少於一天前預約會議室。

toeic.example_en: After the keynote, attendees will join their assigned break-out session.
toeic.example_zh: 主題演講後，與會者將加入指定的分組討論。

toeic.example_en: Make any changes to your benefits during the open enrollment period in November.
toeic.example_zh: 請於 11 月福利開放選擇期內變更您的福利選項。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 合資格的生活事件 (可變更福利)
toeic.example_en: Marriage and the birth of a child are considered qualifying life events.
toeic.example_zh: 結婚與生育子女皆屬合資格的生活事件。

toeic.example_en: You may add your spouse and dependents to your health insurance plan.
toeic.example_zh: 您可將配偶與扶養眷屬加入您的健康保險方案。

toeic.example_en: The vesting schedule grants 25 percent of shares each year over four years.
toeic.example_zh: 歸屬時程表為四年內每年歸屬 25% 股份。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 一次性歸屬 (滿足條件後一次到位)
toeic.example_en: With one-year cliff vesting, no shares vest until the first anniversary.
toeic.example_zh: 一年期一次性歸屬代表須至滿一年才開始歸屬股份。

toeic.example_en: Graded vesting gives employees ownership of shares gradually over time.
toeic.example_zh: 分階段歸屬讓員工逐年取得股份所有權。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 離職策略；退場策略
toeic.example_en: Some startup employees join expecting an exit strategy involving an IPO.
toeic.example_zh: 部分新創員工加入時就預期會有 IPO 等退場策略。

toeic.example_en: The non-solicitation clause prohibits former employees from recruiting our staff.
toeic.example_zh: 禁止招攬條款禁止前員工招募我們的員工。

toeic.example_en: All employees sign an intellectual property assignment agreement on day one.
toeic.example_zh: 所有員工於到職第一天簽署智慧財產權讓與協議。

toeic.example_en: Employees must protect company trade secrets even after leaving the company.
toeic.example_zh: 員工即使離職後也必須保護公司的營業秘密。

toeic.example_en: The confidentiality agreement remains in effect for five years after termination.
toeic.example_zh: 保密協議於終止僱用後仍持續有效五年。

toeic.example_en: The exclusivity clause prevents employees from working for competitors during employment.
toeic.example_zh: 排他性條款禁止員工在任職期間為競爭對手工作。

toeic.example_en: The court ordered the company to garnish wages for unpaid child support.
toeic.example_zh: 法院命令公司扣押薪資以支付積欠的子女撫養費。

toeic.example_en: Each pay stub itemizes every deduction including taxes and insurance.
toeic.example_zh: 每張薪資明細表逐項列出包含稅金與保險的所有扣款項。

toeic.example_en: Your gross pay is calculated before any deductions are taken out.
toeic.example_zh: 您的稅前薪資總額是在扣除任何款項之前的金額。

toeic.example_en: Your net income reflects what you actually take home after taxes.
toeic.example_zh: 您的淨收入反映稅後實際拿到手的金額。

toeic.example_en: Health insurance premiums are typically a pre-tax deduction from your salary.
toeic.example_zh: 健康保險費通常是從您薪資中扣除的稅前項目。

toeic.example_en: Roth 401k contributions are a post-tax deduction.
toeic.example_zh: Roth 401k 提撥屬於稅後扣除額。

toeic.example_en: Please review your wage statement each pay period for any errors.
toeic.example_zh: 請於每個薪資週期檢視您的薪資單以查找任何錯誤。

toeic.example_en: Your year-end statement summarizes total earnings and deductions for tax purposes.
toeic.example_zh: 您的年度薪資結算單彙整全年所得與扣除額以供稅務用途。

toeic.example_en: The payroll register lists every employee's pay details for each cycle.
toeic.example_zh: 薪資登錄表列出每位員工每個薪資週期的薪資明細。

toeic.example_en: Payroll must comply with any court-issued garnishment order.
toeic.example_zh: 薪資作業必須遵守任何法院核發的薪資扣押令。

toeic.example_en: Our pay frequency is biweekly, with paychecks issued every other Friday.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的發薪頻率為兩週一次，每隔週五發薪。

toeic.example_en: Bi-weekly pay results in 26 paychecks per year.
toeic.example_zh: 雙週薪一年共發放 26 次薪資。

toeic.example_en: Semi-monthly pay is issued on the 15th and last day of each month.
toeic.example_zh: 半月薪於每月 15 日及月底發放。

toeic.example_en: Most salaried employees in this region receive monthly pay.
toeic.example_zh: 此地區的多數月薪制員工每月領取月薪。

toeic.example_en: Our merit-based pay system rewards top performers with larger raises.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的績效制薪資制度以較高調薪獎勵頂尖表現者。

toeic.example_en: Under skill-based pay, employees earn more as they acquire new certifications.
toeic.example_zh: 在技能基礎薪酬制下，員工取得新證照後可獲得更高薪資。

toeic.example_en: Broad banding consolidates many narrow pay grades into fewer wider ranges.
toeic.example_zh: 寬幅薪資結構將許多狹窄薪等整併為較少且較寬的薪資範圍。

toeic.example_en: Each pay band has a defined minimum, midpoint, and maximum.
toeic.example_zh: 每個薪資區間都有明確的最低值、中位數與最高值。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 薪資壓縮 (新員工接近資深員工薪資)
toeic.example_en: Pay compression occurs when new hires earn nearly as much as long-tenured employees.
toeic.example_zh: 薪資壓縮發生於新進員工的薪資接近資深員工的情況。

toeic.example_en: Due to the economic downturn, the company implemented a temporary wage freeze.
toeic.example_zh: 因經濟下行，公司實施了暫時性凍薪。

toeic.example_en: The hiring freeze will remain in place until financial conditions improve.
toeic.example_zh: 在財務狀況改善前，凍結招聘措施將持續執行。

toeic.example_en: Each new position requires formal headcount approval from senior leadership.
toeic.example_zh: 每個新職位皆須獲得高階領導層的正式員額核准。

toeic.example_en: All training requests require budget approval from the department head.
toeic.example_zh: 所有訓練需求皆須獲得部門主管的預算核准。

toeic.example_en: Submit a requisition before posting any new job opening.
toeic.example_zh: 刊登任何新職缺前須先提交職缺申請單。

toeic.example_en: There are currently 15 open positions across the engineering department.
toeic.example_zh: 工程部門目前共有 15 個開放職缺。

toeic.example_en: We need to backfill her role within the next two months.
toeic.example_zh: 我們需要在未來兩個月內遞補她的職位。

toeic.example_en: Internal postings are shared with employees before external recruitment begins.
toeic.example_zh: 內部職缺公告會先與員工分享，之後再進行對外招募。

toeic.example_en: Internal mobility allows employees to grow their careers within the company.
toeic.example_zh: 內部人才流動讓員工能在公司內發展職涯。

toeic.example_en: Our career fair booth attracts hundreds of resumes from top universities.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的就業博覽會攤位吸引了頂尖大學數百份履歷。

toeic.example_en: The recruitment campaign aims to hire 100 engineers within six months.
toeic.example_zh: 這項招募活動目標是六個月內招聘 100 位工程師。

toeic.example_en: Our diversity hiring goal is to increase representation in technical roles.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的多元招募目標是提升技術職位的代表性。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 匿名履歷 (隱去個資)
toeic.example_en: Using blind resumes helps reduce unconscious bias in initial screening.
toeic.example_zh: 使用匿名履歷有助於減少初步篩選中的無意識偏見。

toeic.example_en: Structured hiring uses standardized criteria to evaluate every candidate fairly.
toeic.example_zh: 結構化招募運用標準化標準公平評估每位候選人。

toeic.example_en: Each interviewer completes a scorecard rating the candidate on key competencies.
toeic.example_zh: 每位面試官需填寫評分表，針對關鍵職能為候選人評分。

toeic.example_en: Use the five-point rating scale to evaluate each interview question.
toeic.example_zh: 請使用五點評等量表評估每道面試題目。

toeic.example_en: We calibrate ratings across managers to ensure consistency.
toeic.example_zh: 我們會校準各主管的評等以確保一致性。

toeic.example_en: The norming session aligns interviewers on what each rating level means.
toeic.example_zh: 標準化會議讓面試官對各評等等級的意義達成一致。

toeic.example_en: The fit assessment considers both cultural alignment and team dynamics.
toeic.example_zh: 適配度評估同時考量文化契合與團隊互動。

toeic.example_en: Strong culture fit predicts long-term employee success and retention.
toeic.example_zh: 良好的文化契合度可預示員工長期的成功與留任。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 文化加值 (帶入新觀點)
toeic.example_en: We seek candidates who bring culture add rather than just culture fit.
toeic.example_zh: 我們尋找能帶來文化加值而不只是文化契合的候選人。

toeic.example_en: Complete every item on the onboarding checklist within the first 30 days.
toeic.example_zh: 請於到職前 30 天內完成入職檢核清單上的每一項。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 報到前預先入職流程
toeic.example_en: Preboarding activities engage new hires before their official start date.
toeic.example_zh: 報到前預先入職流程能在新員工正式報到日前與其互動。

toeic.example_en: Every new hire receives a welcome kit with company swag on their first day.
toeic.example_zh: 每位新進員工於到職首日皆會收到含公司紀念品的歡迎禮包。

toeic.example_en: Company swag includes branded t-shirts, water bottles, and notebooks.
toeic.example_zh: 公司紀念品包括品牌 T 恤、水壺與筆記本。

toeic.example_en: A positive first day experience sets the tone for long-term engagement.
toeic.example_zh: 良好的首日體驗能為長期敬業度奠定基調。

toeic.example_en: Your 30-60-90 day plan outlines key milestones for your first three months.
toeic.example_zh: 您的 30/60/90 天計畫列出前三個月的關鍵里程碑。

toeic.example_en: The ramp-up period for new sales representatives is typically six months.
toeic.example_zh: 新進業務代表的上手期通常為六個月。

toeic.example_en: The learning curve for this software is steep but well documented.
toeic.example_zh: 這套軟體的學習曲線陡峭但文件完善。

toeic.example_en: Subject matter training covers product knowledge specific to your role.
toeic.example_zh: 專業領域訓練涵蓋與您職位相關的產品知識。

toeic.example_en: System training shows new hires how to use our internal tools.
toeic.example_zh: 系統操作訓練教導新進員工如何使用我們的內部工具。

toeic.example_en: Compliance certification must be renewed every two years.
toeic.example_zh: 法令遵循認證每兩年須重新取得。

toeic.example_en: Safety training is mandatory before working in any restricted area.
toeic.example_zh: 進入任何限制區域工作前皆須完成強制性安全訓練。

toeic.example_en: Several team members maintain a current first aid certification.
toeic.example_zh: 團隊中有數位成員持有有效的急救證照。

toeic.example_en: Free CPR training is offered to employees twice per year.
toeic.example_zh: 公司每年兩次免費提供員工心肺復甦術訓練。

toeic.example_en: Special training is required for employees who handle hazardous materials.
toeic.example_zh: 處理危險物質的員工須接受專門訓練。

toeic.example_en: Please keep your emergency contact information up to date in the HR system.
toeic.example_zh: 請於人資系統中保持您的緊急聯絡人資料更新。

toeic.example_en: Provide the name and phone number of your next of kin in the personnel file.
toeic.example_zh: 請在員工檔案中提供您至親的姓名與電話號碼。

toeic.example_en: Any workplace incident must be documented in an incident report within 24 hours.
toeic.example_zh: 任何職場事故必須於 24 小時內以事故報告記錄。

toeic.example_en: Reporting a near miss helps prevent future accidents.
toeic.example_zh: 回報險些發生的事故有助於預防未來意外。

toeic.example_en: Root cause analysis identifies underlying issues behind workplace accidents.
toeic.example_zh: 根本原因分析能找出職場事故背後的根本問題。

toeic.example_en: Following the audit, several corrective actions were implemented.
toeic.example_zh: 稽核之後實施了多項矯正措施。

toeic.example_en: Preventive actions are taken to avoid future occurrences of safety issues.
toeic.example_zh: 採取預防措施以避免未來再發生安全問題。

toeic.example_en: An external safety audit is conducted annually at every facility.
toeic.example_zh: 每年於每處場所進行外部安全稽核。

toeic.example_en: A risk assessment must be completed before any new process is launched.
toeic.example_zh: 啟動任何新流程前必須完成風險評估。

toeic.example_en: Hazard identification is the first step in any safety management program.
toeic.example_zh: 危害辨識是任何安全管理計畫的第一步。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 個人防護裝備 (personal protective equipment)
toeic.example_en: Proper PPE must be worn at all times in the laboratory.
toeic.example_zh: 實驗室內必須隨時穿戴適當的 PPE。

toeic.example_en: The safety committee meets monthly to review incidents and policies.
toeic.example_zh: 安全委員會每月開會檢視事件與政策。

toeic.example_en: Quarterly evacuation drills prepare staff for real emergencies.
toeic.example_zh: 每季的疏散演習讓員工為實際緊急狀況做好準備。

toeic.example_en: All employees should gather at the designated muster point during an evacuation.
toeic.example_zh: 疏散時所有員工應集合至指定的集合點。

toeic.example_en: Each floor has a designated fire warden trained in emergency procedures.
toeic.example_zh: 每樓層皆設有受過緊急程序訓練的指定防火管理員。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 自動體外心臟去顫器
toeic.example_en: AEDs are installed near every elevator on each floor.
toeic.example_zh: 每樓層每部電梯附近皆裝設 AED。

toeic.example_en: Occupational health programs focus on preventing work-related illnesses.
toeic.example_zh: 職業健康計畫著重於預防與工作相關的疾病。

toeic.example_en: Physical therapy is covered under our workers compensation program.
toeic.example_zh: 物理治療納入我們的勞工職災補償計畫保障範圍內。

toeic.example_en: The return-to-work plan outlines modified duties during recovery.
toeic.example_zh: 復工計畫列出復原期間的調整職務內容。

toeic.example_en: Employees recovering from injury may be assigned light duty temporarily.
toeic.example_zh: 受傷康復中的員工可暫時被指派輕度工作。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 職務適任性 (健康可勝任)
toeic.example_en: A fitness for duty evaluation may be required after extended medical leave.
toeic.example_zh: 長期病假後可能需要進行職務適任性評估。

toeic.example_en: Occupational therapy helps injured workers regain functional abilities for their jobs.
toeic.example_zh: 職能治療協助受傷員工重拾工作所需的功能能力。

toeic.example_en: Repetitive strain is a common ergonomic injury for desk-based workers.
toeic.example_zh: 重複性勞損是辦公桌前工作者常見的人因傷害。

toeic.example_en: Musculoskeletal disorders account for many workplace injury claims.
toeic.example_zh: 肌肉骨骼疾病占了許多職場傷害的索賠案件。

toeic.example_en: Ergonomic keyboards can help reduce the risk of carpal tunnel syndrome.
toeic.example_zh: 符合人體工學的鍵盤可降低罹患腕隧道症候群的風險。

toeic.example_en: Take a break every 20 minutes to reduce eye strain from screens.
toeic.example_zh: 每 20 分鐘休息一次可減輕看螢幕造成的眼睛疲勞。

toeic.example_en: Work-related stress can significantly impact both health and productivity.
toeic.example_zh: 工作相關壓力可能顯著影響健康與生產力。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 心理健康；心理福祉
toeic.example_en: Employee mental wellbeing has become a top priority for HR teams.
toeic.example_zh: 員工心理福祉已成為人資團隊的首要任務之一。

toeic.example_en: Our mindfulness program offers weekly guided meditation sessions.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的正念計畫每週提供引導冥想課程。

toeic.example_en: The meditation room provides a quiet space for relaxation during breaks.
toeic.example_zh: 冥想室於休息時間提供安靜的放鬆空間。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 健康檢查；關懷關心
toeic.example_en: Managers are encouraged to conduct regular wellness checks with their teams.
toeic.example_zh: 公司鼓勵主管定期對其團隊進行關懷檢視。

toeic.example_en: Free health screenings are offered to employees every spring.
toeic.example_zh: 每年春季提供員工免費健康篩檢。

toeic.example_en: Biometric screening measures blood pressure, cholesterol, and BMI.
toeic.example_zh: 生物指標篩檢測量血壓、膽固醇與 BMI。

toeic.example_en: The on-site flu shot clinic will be available next Tuesday.
toeic.example_zh: 駐點流感疫苗接種站將於下週二開放。

toeic.example_en: Our smoking cessation program provides counseling and free nicotine replacement.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的戒菸計畫提供諮詢與免費尼古丁替代物。

toeic.example_en: The weight management program includes nutrition counseling and fitness coaching.
toeic.example_zh: 體重管理計畫包含營養諮詢與健身指導。

toeic.example_en: Our diabetes prevention program is offered free of charge to all employees.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的糖尿病預防計畫免費提供給所有員工。

toeic.example_en: Financial wellness workshops cover budgeting, debt management, and retirement planning.
toeic.example_zh: 財務健康工作坊涵蓋預算編列、債務管理與退休規劃。

toeic.example_en: Retirement counseling helps employees plan for a secure financial future.
toeic.example_zh: 退休諮商協助員工規劃穩健的財務未來。

toeic.example_en: Employees can meet with a financial advisor at no cost twice a year.
toeic.example_zh: 員工每年可免費與財務顧問會談兩次。

toeic.example_en: The employee discount program offers savings at hundreds of retailers.
toeic.example_zh: 員工折扣計畫於數百家零售商提供優惠。

toeic.example_en: The concierge service handles personal errands so employees can focus on work.
toeic.example_zh: 禮賓服務處理員工的個人雜事，讓員工能專注於工作。

toeic.example_en: On-site dry cleaning service is available every Wednesday in the lobby.
toeic.example_zh: 每週三大廳提供駐點乾洗服務。

toeic.example_en: The free shuttle bus runs between the office and the metro station.
toeic.example_zh: 免費接駁車往返於辦公室與捷運站之間。

toeic.example_en: The parking benefit covers monthly garage fees for full-time employees.
toeic.example_zh: 停車福利為全職員工提供每月停車場費用補助。

toeic.example_en: Our parking lot includes 20 EV charging stations for employee use.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的停車場設有 20 個供員工使用的電動車充電站。

toeic.example_en: Covered bike racks encourage employees to commute by bicycle.
toeic.example_zh: 有遮頂的單車停放架鼓勵員工以單車通勤。

toeic.example_en: Shower facilities are available for employees who exercise during lunch.
toeic.example_zh: 公司為午休運動的員工提供淋浴設施。

toeic.example_en: The company cafeteria offers fresh meals from 7 a.m. to 8 p.m.
toeic.example_zh: 員工餐廳於上午 7 點至晚上 8 點提供新鮮餐點。

toeic.example_en: Subsidized meals cost only 3 dollars in the company cafeteria.
toeic.example_zh: 在員工餐廳享用補助餐點僅需 3 美元。

toeic.example_en: Employees working late receive a meal voucher for dinner.
toeic.example_zh: 加班的員工可獲得晚餐餐券。

toeic.example_en: All employees receive a monthly transportation allowance.
toeic.example_zh: 全體員工每月可獲得交通津貼。

toeic.example_en: Expatriate employees receive a housing allowance based on local market rates.
toeic.example_zh: 外派員工依當地市場行情獲得住房津貼。

toeic.example_en: A cost of living allowance helps offset higher expenses in major cities.
toeic.example_zh: 生活費津貼有助於抵消大城市較高的生活開銷。

toeic.example_en: Employees stationed in remote areas receive a hardship allowance.
toeic.example_zh: 派駐偏遠地區的員工可獲得艱苦地區津貼。

toeic.example_en: Our education assistance program covers tuition for job-related degrees.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的教育補助計畫支付與工作相關學位的學費。

toeic.example_en: The scholarship program supports children of employees pursuing higher education.
toeic.example_zh: 獎學金計畫支援員工子女接受高等教育。

toeic.example_en: Adoption assistance covers up to 5,000 dollars in expenses per child.
toeic.example_zh: 收養補助每位孩子最多補助 5,000 美元的費用。

toeic.example_en: Our fertility benefit covers in vitro fertilization treatments up to 25,000 dollars.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的生育治療福利支付試管嬰兒治療最高 25,000 美元。

toeic.example_en: The surrogacy benefit helps employees grow their families.
toeic.example_zh: 代孕福利協助員工建立家庭。

toeic.example_en: Pet insurance is now offered as a voluntary benefit through payroll deduction.
toeic.example_zh: 現可透過薪資扣款方式投保寵物保險作為自願福利。

toeic.example_en: The legal services benefit provides discounted access to attorneys.
toeic.example_zh: 法律服務福利提供折扣價的律師諮詢服務。

toeic.example_en: Identity theft protection is provided at no cost to all employees.
toeic.example_zh: 公司免費為所有員工提供身分盜用保護服務。

toeic.example_en: Long-term care insurance helps cover assisted living and nursing home costs.
toeic.example_zh: 長期照護保險有助於支付安養與護理之家的費用。

toeic.example_en: Critical illness insurance provides a lump-sum payment upon diagnosis.
toeic.example_zh: 重大疾病保險於確診時一次性給付保險金。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 意外死亡及殘廢保險 (AD&D)
toeic.example_en: Accidental death and dismemberment coverage is included with our basic life policy.
toeic.example_zh: 意外死亡及殘廢保險已涵蓋於我們的基本人壽保單內。

toeic.example_en: Vision insurance covers annual eye exams and discounts on glasses.
toeic.example_zh: 視力保險涵蓋每年眼睛檢查與眼鏡折扣。

toeic.example_en: Our health plan now includes hearing aid coverage every three years.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的健康保險方案現每三年給付一次助聽器。

toeic.example_en: Employees may take a mental health day without providing a doctor's note.
toeic.example_zh: 員工可請心理健康假，無需提供醫師證明。

toeic.example_en: The company observes a wellness day each quarter when all offices close.
toeic.example_zh: 公司每季有一天健康日，當天所有辦公室皆休息。

toeic.example_en: Use your flex day whenever you need an extra break.
toeic.example_zh: 您可在需要額外休息時使用彈性休假日。

toeic.example_en: Personal time off is granted at the manager's discretion.
toeic.example_zh: 個人休假由主管自行裁量核准。

toeic.example_en: Unused vacation pay is paid out at the end of each year.
toeic.example_zh: 未使用的休假薪資於年底結算發放。

toeic.example_en: Up to five days of vacation carryover is permitted into the next year.
toeic.example_zh: 最多可遞延五天休假至下一年度使用。

toeic.example_en: Our vacation policy is use-it-or-lose-it at the end of each calendar year.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的休假政策是在每年年底前不用就失效。

toeic.example_en: Check your leave balance in the HR system before requesting time off.
toeic.example_zh: 請假前請於人資系統中查詢您的休假餘額。

toeic.example_en: Time tracking software helps ensure accurate billing for client projects.
toeic.example_zh: 工時追蹤軟體有助於確保客戶專案的計費準確。

toeic.example_en: Please submit your timesheet by 5 p.m. every Friday.
toeic.example_zh: 請於每週五下午 5 點前提交您的工時表。

toeic.example_en: Hourly employees must clock in when they start their shift.
toeic.example_zh: 時薪制員工開始上班時必須打卡。

toeic.example_en: Remember to clock out before leaving the building.
toeic.example_zh: 離開大樓前請記得打卡下班。

toeic.example_en: The biometric time clock uses fingerprints to record attendance.
toeic.example_zh: 生物辨識打卡機使用指紋記錄出勤。

toeic.example_en: Please review the attendance policy in the employee handbook.
toeic.example_zh: 請查閱員工手冊中的出勤政策。

toeic.example_en: Three consecutive no-shows may result in termination.
toeic.example_zh: 連續三次未到可能導致解僱。

toeic.example_en: He called out sick yesterday because of the flu.
toeic.example_zh: 他昨天因流感請了病假。

toeic.example_en: A doctor's note is required for any sick leave longer than three days.
toeic.example_zh: 請病假超過三天須提供醫師證明。

toeic.example_en: Please submit your medical certificate to HR within five business days.
toeic.example_zh: 請於五個工作日內向人資部提交醫療證明。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 家庭與醫療假法假期
toeic.example_en: FMLA leave protects your job for up to 12 weeks of unpaid absence.
toeic.example_zh: FMLA 假期保障您的職位最多 12 週的無薪缺勤。

toeic.example_en: Intermittent leave allows employees to take time off in small increments.
toeic.example_zh: 間歇性休假讓員工可分段小幅請假。

toeic.example_en: Short-term disability replaces income for up to six months of absence.
toeic.example_zh: 短期失能保險可補償最多六個月缺勤期間的收入。

toeic.example_en: Long-term disability takes effect after short-term benefits are exhausted.
toeic.example_zh: 短期保險用罄後即由長期失能保險接續。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 勞工職災補償索賠
toeic.example_en: He filed a workers comp claim after injuring his back at work.
toeic.example_zh: 他在工作中傷到背部後提出了勞工職災補償索賠。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 職業安全與健康署檢查
toeic.example_en: An OSHA inspection of the warehouse is scheduled for next week.
toeic.example_zh: 倉庫的職業安全與健康署檢查預定於下週進行。

toeic.example_en: An annual compliance audit ensures we meet all regulatory requirements.
toeic.example_zh: 年度合規稽核確保我們符合所有監管要求。

toeic.example_en: Any policy violation must be reported to HR immediately.
toeic.example_zh: 任何違反政策的情形必須立即向人資部回報。

toeic.example_en: All employees must acknowledge the code of ethics annually.
toeic.example_zh: 所有員工每年皆須確認倫理守則。

toeic.example_en: The ethics hotline allows confidential reporting of concerns.
toeic.example_zh: 倫理檢舉專線允許保密回報疑慮。

toeic.example_en: Whistleblower protection ensures employees can report wrongdoing without fear.
toeic.example_zh: 吹哨者保護確保員工能無懼地舉報不當行為。

toeic.example_en: Retaliation against employees who file complaints is strictly prohibited.
toeic.example_zh: 嚴禁對提出申訴的員工進行報復。

toeic.example_en: Workplace harassment of any kind will not be tolerated.
toeic.example_zh: 公司絕不容忍任何形式的職場騷擾。

toeic.example_en: Persistent harassment may create a hostile work environment.
toeic.example_zh: 持續性的騷擾可能造成敵意工作環境。

toeic.example_en: Workplace bullying takes many forms and must be addressed promptly.
toeic.example_zh: 職場霸凌有多種形式，必須立即處理。

toeic.example_en: HR launched a formal investigation following the complaint.
toeic.example_zh: 人資部在收到申訴後展開正式調查。

toeic.example_en: Due process must be followed before taking any disciplinary action.
toeic.example_zh: 在採取任何懲處措施前必須遵守正當程序。

toeic.example_en: Employees are entitled to a fair hearing before termination.
toeic.example_zh: 員工於解僱前有權獲得公平聽證。

toeic.example_en: Employees may use the appeal process to challenge disciplinary decisions.
toeic.example_zh: 員工可透過申訴流程對懲處決定提出異議。

toeic.example_en: Our labor relations team manages the relationship between management and unions.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的勞資關係團隊負責管理資方與工會間的關係。

toeic.example_en: The union contract is renegotiated every three years.
toeic.example_zh: 工會合約每三年重新協商一次。

toeic.example_en: The collective agreement sets wages and working conditions for all members.
toeic.example_zh: 集體協議規範所有成員的工資與工作條件。

toeic.example_en: Shop floor workers operate the production machinery daily.
toeic.example_zh: 廠房現場的工人每日操作生產機具。

toeic.example_en: Workers staged a walkout to protest unsafe conditions.
toeic.example_zh: 工人發動罷工離場以抗議不安全的工作條件。

toeic.example_en: A work stoppage was called to demand higher wages.
toeic.example_zh: 為要求調薪而宣布停工。

toeic.example_en: Management initiated a lockout after negotiations broke down.
toeic.example_zh: 在協商破裂後資方發動封廠。

toeic.example_en: Union members held a strike vote and approved action by 85 percent.
toeic.example_zh: 工會成員舉行罷工投票，以 85% 支持率通過行動。

toeic.example_en: Contract ratification requires a majority vote of union members.
toeic.example_zh: 合約批准需獲得工會成員的過半數票。

toeic.example_en: Both parties must engage in good faith bargaining under labor law.
toeic.example_zh: 依勞動法規定，雙方必須進行誠信協商。

toeic.example_en: A neutral mediator was brought in to help resolve the dispute.
toeic.example_zh: 公司請來一位中立調解員協助解決爭端。

toeic.example_en: The arbitrator's decision is binding on both parties.
toeic.example_zh: 仲裁員的裁決對雙方皆具約束力。

toeic.example_en: Disputes will be resolved through binding arbitration as outlined in the contract.
toeic.example_zh: 爭議將依合約規定透過拘束性仲裁解決。

toeic.example_en: The grievance procedure has three steps before reaching arbitration.
toeic.example_zh: 申訴程序在進入仲裁前共有三個步驟。

toeic.example_en: The labor dispute was settled after weeks of negotiations.
toeic.example_zh: 經過數週協商後，這場勞資爭議獲得解決。

toeic.example_en: The wage dispute centered on cost-of-living adjustments.
toeic.example_zh: 這場工資爭議的核心在於生活成本調整。

toeic.example_en: The federal minimum wage has not changed in over a decade.
toeic.example_zh: 聯邦最低工資已超過十年未調整。

toeic.example_en: A living wage covers basic needs in the local area.
toeic.example_zh: 基本生活工資能滿足當地的基本生活需求。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 通行工資；現行工資
toeic.example_en: Government contractors must pay the prevailing wage for the region.
toeic.example_zh: 政府承包商必須支付該地區的現行工資。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 小費抵扣 (服務業薪資)
toeic.example_en: Restaurant employers may apply a tip credit toward the minimum wage requirement.
toeic.example_zh: 餐廳雇主可運用小費抵扣以符合最低工資要求。

toeic.example_en: Tipped employees report their tips to the IRS each pay period.
toeic.example_zh: 領小費的員工於每個薪資週期向國稅局申報其小費。

toeic.example_en: Service charges differ from tips and are distributed at the employer's discretion.
toeic.example_zh: 服務費與小費不同，由雇主自行決定如何分配。

toeic.example_en: Factory workers may be paid on a piece rate basis for each unit produced.
toeic.example_zh: 工廠工人可按每生產一件的件薪標準領薪。

toeic.example_en: She accepted a salaried position with a guaranteed annual income.
toeic.example_zh: 她接受了一個保證年薪的月薪職位。

toeic.example_en: Hourly positions are paid based on the actual hours worked.
toeic.example_zh: 時薪職位依實際工作時數支薪。

toeic.example_en: The consultant fee is billed at 200 dollars per hour.
toeic.example_zh: 顧問費以每小時 200 美元計費。

toeic.example_en: The law firm charges a monthly retainer of 5,000 dollars.
toeic.example_zh: 該律師事務所每月收取 5,000 美元的預付聘金。

toeic.example_en: Milestone payments are made upon completion of each project phase.
toeic.example_zh: 階段付款於每個專案階段完成時撥付。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 範疇蔓延 (工作範圍超出原訂)
toeic.example_en: Scope creep often leads to budget overruns and missed deadlines.
toeic.example_zh: 範疇蔓延常導致預算超支與錯過期限。

toeic.example_en: The statement of work outlines deliverables, timeline, and pricing.
toeic.example_zh: 工作說明書列出交付項目、時程與價格。

toeic.example_en: The master service agreement sets the overall terms for all future engagements.
toeic.example_zh: 主服務協議規定未來所有合作的整體條款。

toeic.example_en: Vendor management ensures third-party providers meet performance standards.
toeic.example_zh: 供應商管理確保第三方廠商符合績效標準。

toeic.example_en: All staffing agencies on our preferred vendor list have been pre-qualified.
toeic.example_zh: 我們優先廠商名單上的人力派遣公司均已通過資格預審。

toeic.example_en: The staffing agency provides temporary workers on short notice.
toeic.example_zh: 人力派遣公司能於短時間內提供臨時工。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 高階主管獵頭公司
toeic.example_en: We engaged an executive search firm to find our new CFO.
toeic.example_zh: 我們委託了一家高階主管獵頭公司尋找新任財務長。

toeic.example_en: Recruitment process outsourcing helps companies scale hiring quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 招募流程外包能協助公司迅速擴大招聘規模。

toeic.example_en: A professional employer organization can handle HR administration for small businesses.
toeic.example_zh: 專業雇主組織可為小型企業處理人資行政事務。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 共同雇用 (與 PEO 共享雇主責任)
toeic.example_en: Under co-employment, the PEO shares certain employer responsibilities.
toeic.example_zh: 在共同雇用模式下，PEO 共享部分雇主責任。

toeic.example_en: A franchisor may be considered a joint employer under certain conditions.
toeic.example_zh: 加盟主在特定情況下可能被視為共同雇主。

toeic.example_en: Our third-party administrator processes all benefits claims.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的第三方管理者負責處理所有福利索賠。

toeic.example_en: The benefits broker helps us select competitive insurance plans.
toeic.example_zh: 福利經紀人協助我們挑選具競爭力的保險方案。

toeic.example_en: We work with three insurance carriers to offer plan choices.
toeic.example_zh: 我們與三家保險承保公司合作提供方案選擇。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 網絡內醫療提供者
toeic.example_en: Visiting a network provider results in lower out-of-pocket costs.
toeic.example_zh: 看診時選擇網絡內醫療提供者可降低自費金額。

toeic.example_en: Out-of-network care is covered at a reduced rate under most plans.
toeic.example_zh: 大多數方案對網絡外的醫療給付比例較低。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 健康維護組織 (HMO) 保險
toeic.example_en: An HMO plan requires you to choose a primary care physician.
toeic.example_zh: HMO 保險要求您選擇一位家庭醫師。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 優選提供者組織 (PPO) 保險
toeic.example_en: A PPO plan offers more flexibility but higher premiums than an HMO.
toeic.example_zh: PPO 保險的彈性高於 HMO，但保費較高。

toeic.example_en: A high-deductible plan typically pairs with a health savings account.
toeic.example_zh: 高自負額保險通常搭配健康儲蓄帳戶。

toeic.example_en: Once you reach your out-of-pocket maximum, insurance covers 100 percent.
toeic.example_zh: 當您達到自付上限後，保險將給付 100% 的費用。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) COBRA 延續性健康保險
toeic.example_en: COBRA coverage allows former employees to continue health insurance after termination.
toeic.example_zh: COBRA 延續性保險讓離職員工可在終止僱用後繼續享有健康保險。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 合資格事件 (觸發 COBRA 等)
toeic.example_en: Termination of employment is a qualifying event for COBRA continuation.
toeic.example_zh: 終止僱用是觸發 COBRA 延續性保險的合資格事件。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 福利方案摘要說明書
toeic.example_en: The summary plan description explains your benefits in plain language.
toeic.example_zh: 福利方案摘要說明書以簡明文字說明您的福利。

toeic.example_en: Our plan year runs from July 1 to June 30 of the following year.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的保險方案年度為 7 月 1 日至次年 6 月 30 日。

toeic.example_en: The claims process for reimbursement can be completed online.
toeic.example_zh: 報銷索賠程序可線上完成。

toeic.example_en: Review your explanation of benefits to confirm coverage for each service.
toeic.example_zh: 請查閱您的福利說明書以確認各項服務的給付情形。

toeic.example_en: Evidence of insurability may be required for life insurance above a certain amount.
toeic.example_zh: 高於特定金額的人壽保險可能需要提供可保性證明。

toeic.example_en: Earn a wellness incentive of 500 dollars by completing your annual health assessment.
toeic.example_zh: 完成年度健康評估可獲得 500 美元的健康促進獎勵。

toeic.example_en: A biometric incentive is offered to employees who meet certain health markers.
toeic.example_zh: 達到特定健康指標的員工可獲得生物指標獎勵。

toeic.example_en: The annual step challenge encourages employees to walk more each day.
toeic.example_zh: 年度步數挑戰鼓勵員工每天多走路。

toeic.example_en: Our team won the office fitness challenge by logging the most exercise hours.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的團隊以最高的運動時數贏得辦公室健身挑戰。

toeic.example_en: Access health resources and track progress through the wellness portal.
toeic.example_zh: 可透過健康促進平台取得健康資源並追蹤進度。

toeic.example_en: Telehealth visits are available 24 hours a day under our health plan.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的健康方案 24 小時提供遠距醫療看診。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 員工協助方案諮商
toeic.example_en: EAP counseling provides up to eight free sessions per issue per year.
toeic.example_zh: 員工協助方案諮商每年每項議題提供最多八次免費諮商。

toeic.example_en: EAP services include crisis intervention available around the clock.
toeic.example_zh: 員工協助方案服務包含 24 小時提供的危機介入支援。

toeic.example_en: Grief counseling is available to employees coping with loss.
toeic.example_zh: 公司為面對喪親之痛的員工提供喪親諮商服務。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 物質濫用協助計畫
toeic.example_en: The substance abuse program offers confidential treatment options.
toeic.example_zh: 物質濫用協助計畫提供保密的治療選項。

toeic.example_en: Employees can take rehab leave for substance abuse treatment.
toeic.example_zh: 員工可請戒癮治療假以接受物質濫用治療。

toeic.example_en: Employee wellbeing has become a strategic priority for HR.
toeic.example_zh: 員工身心健康已成為人資的策略性優先事項。

toeic.example_en: Flexible work arrangements are available to all eligible employees.
toeic.example_zh: 所有符合資格的員工皆可申請彈性工作安排。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 純結果導向工作環境 (ROWE)
toeic.example_en: A results-only work environment focuses on outcomes rather than hours worked.
toeic.example_zh: 純結果導向工作環境著重於成果而非工時。

toeic.example_en: Asynchronous work allows team members in different time zones to collaborate effectively.
toeic.example_zh: 非同步工作讓不同時區的團隊成員能有效協作。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 核心工時 (規定須在線)
toeic.example_en: Core hours from 10 a.m. to 3 p.m. require all team members to be available.
toeic.example_zh: 上午 10 點至下午 3 點的核心工時要求所有團隊成員皆須在線。

toeic.example_en: Tuesday is our anchor day when the whole team comes to the office.
toeic.example_zh: 週二是我們的固定到辦公室日，全團隊都會進公司。

toeic.example_en: Our policy requires three in-office days per week.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的政策要求每週有三天進辦公室上班。

toeic.example_en: We are a remote-first company with no required office presence.
toeic.example_zh: 我們是遠距優先的公司，沒有強制到辦公室的要求。

toeic.example_en: Our office-first model requires daily attendance with limited remote days.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的辦公室優先模式要求每天到班，遠距日數有限。

toeic.example_en: Our distributed team spans 15 countries and 5 time zones.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的分散式團隊橫跨 15 個國家與 5 個時區。

toeic.example_en: Managing a global team requires strong communication and cultural sensitivity.
toeic.example_zh: 管理全球團隊需要良好的溝通與文化敏感度。

toeic.example_en: Each regional office is responsible for its local market operations.
toeic.example_zh: 每個區域辦公室負責當地市場的營運。

toeic.example_en: The company headquarters is located in New York City.
toeic.example_zh: 公司總部位於紐約市。

toeic.example_en: The new branch office will open next quarter in São Paulo.
toeic.example_zh: 新的分公司將於下一季在聖保羅開幕。

toeic.example_en: Field offices are located closer to client sites for better service.
toeic.example_zh: 外勤辦公室設於更靠近客戶現場處以提供更好的服務。

toeic.example_en: Consultants often spend most of the week at the client site.
toeic.example_zh: 顧問經常一週大部分時間都待在客戶現場。

toeic.example_en: Our co-located team works in the same physical office five days a week.
toeic.example_zh: 我們共同辦公的團隊每週五天在同一實體辦公室工作。

toeic.example_en: Effective virtual team leadership requires clear goals and frequent check-ins.
toeic.example_zh: 有效的虛擬團隊領導需要明確目標與頻繁的確認。

toeic.example_en: Regular knowledge sharing sessions help spread expertise across the team.
toeic.example_zh: 定期的知識分享會議能將專業知識在團隊間傳播。

toeic.example_en: Good documentation makes it easier for new hires to ramp up quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 良好的文件紀錄有助於新進員工快速上手。

toeic.example_en: Update the team wiki whenever you discover a better process.
toeic.example_zh: 每當您發現更好的流程時，請更新團隊維基。

toeic.example_en: The onboarding playbook walks new hires through their first 30 days.
toeic.example_zh: 新人入職操作手冊引導新進員工度過前 30 天。

toeic.example_en: The training manual covers all standard operating procedures.
toeic.example_zh: 訓練手冊涵蓋所有標準作業程序。

toeic.example_en: Check the HR FAQ before submitting a question to the team.
toeic.example_zh: 在向團隊提問前請先查看人資常見問題集。

toeic.example_en: Each policy document is reviewed and updated annually.
toeic.example_zh: 每份政策文件每年皆會檢視並更新。

toeic.example_en: Company policy prohibits sharing confidential information externally.
toeic.example_zh: 公司政策禁止對外分享機密資訊。

toeic.example_en: All employees were notified of the recent policy change via email.
toeic.example_zh: 所有員工均透過電子郵件收到近期政策變更的通知。

toeic.example_en: Please sign the acknowledgment form confirming receipt of the handbook.
toeic.example_zh: 請簽署確認表單以確認已收到員工手冊。

toeic.example_en: The termination letter explains the reasons and effective date of separation.
toeic.example_zh: 終止僱用通知書說明離職原因與生效日期。

toeic.example_en: The final paycheck includes any unused vacation time.
toeic.example_zh: 最終薪資包含任何未使用的休假時間。

toeic.example_en: Former employees receive a COBRA notice within 14 days of separation.
toeic.example_zh: 前員工於離職後 14 天內會收到 COBRA 通知書。

toeic.example_en: We offer outplacement service to help laid-off employees find new jobs.
toeic.example_zh: 我們提供離職轉介服務協助被裁員工尋找新工作。

toeic.example_en: Career transition support includes resume writing and interview coaching.
toeic.example_zh: 職涯轉換支援包含履歷撰寫與面試指導。

toeic.example_en: Strong personal branding can accelerate your job search.
toeic.example_zh: 強而有力的個人品牌可加速您的求職過程。

toeic.example_en: An up-to-date LinkedIn profile attracts recruiter attention.
toeic.example_zh: 保持更新的 LinkedIn 個人檔案能吸引招募人員的注意。

toeic.example_en: Networking is one of the most effective ways to find new opportunities.
toeic.example_zh: 人脈經營是尋找新機會最有效的方式之一。

toeic.example_en: An informational interview lets you learn about a role without applying.
toeic.example_zh: 諮詢性面談讓您能在不應徵的情況下了解某個職位。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 電梯簡報 (30 秒自我介紹)
toeic.example_en: Practice your elevator pitch to introduce yourself confidently in 30 seconds.
toeic.example_zh: 練習您的電梯簡報以在 30 秒內自信地自我介紹。

toeic.example_en: Building a strong professional network benefits your career for years.
toeic.example_zh: 建立堅實的專業人脈將使您的職涯受益多年。

toeic.example_en: Membership in the industry association includes access to conferences and publications.
toeic.example_zh: 加入產業協會的會員資格可參與研討會並取得出版品。

toeic.example_en: The CPA professional designation requires passing a rigorous exam.
toeic.example_zh: 註冊會計師專業稱號需通過嚴格的考試。

toeic.example_en: Maintaining your license requires continuing professional education credits.
toeic.example_zh: 維持執照需取得持續專業教育學分。

toeic.example_en: Employees can earn CEU credits through approved training programs.
toeic.example_zh: 員工可透過認可的訓練計畫取得持續教育學分。

toeic.example_en: License renewal must be completed every two years.
toeic.example_zh: 執照每兩年須完成更新。

toeic.example_en: Background screening verifies education, employment history, and criminal records.
toeic.example_zh: 背景審查驗證學歷、工作經歷與犯罪紀錄。

toeic.example_en: Credential verification confirms that degrees and certifications are legitimate.
toeic.example_zh: 證書資格驗證確認學位與證照的真實性。

toeic.example_en: Education verification typically takes three to five business days.
toeic.example_zh: 學歷驗證通常需三至五個工作日。

toeic.example_en: Employment verification confirms past job titles, dates, and salary.
toeic.example_zh: 雇用紀錄驗證確認過去的職稱、任職期間與薪資。

toeic.example_en: A criminal background check is required for positions handling sensitive data.
toeic.example_zh: 處理敏感資料的職位需進行刑事背景查核。

toeic.example_en: A credit check may be required for finance-related roles.
toeic.example_zh: 金融相關職位可能需要進行信用查核。

toeic.example_en: Drug screening is conducted for safety-sensitive positions.
toeic.example_zh: 安全敏感性高的職位需進行藥物篩檢。

toeic.example_en: A clean motor vehicle record is required for positions involving driving.
toeic.example_zh: 涉及駕駛的職位需有清白的駕駛紀錄。

toeic.example_en: Please provide three professional references for our review.
toeic.example_zh: 請提供三位專業推薦人供我們查核。

toeic.example_en: Prepare a reference list before submitting your application.
toeic.example_zh: 提交申請前請先準備推薦人清單。

toeic.example_en: A strong letter of recommendation can set your application apart.
toeic.example_zh: 強而有力的推薦信能讓您的申請脫穎而出。

toeic.example_en: LinkedIn endorsements from colleagues validate your stated skills.
toeic.example_zh: 來自同事的 LinkedIn 推薦背書可驗證您所列出的技能。

toeic.example_en: Client testimonials are featured prominently on our careers page.
toeic.example_zh: 客戶見證在我們的職涯網頁上醒目展示。

toeic.example_en: Visit our career page to view all current openings.
toeic.example_zh: 請造訪我們的職涯頁面以瀏覽所有目前的職缺。

toeic.example_en: Check your application status through the applicant portal.
toeic.example_zh: 可透過應徵者入口網查詢您的申請狀態。

toeic.example_en: Complete your online application before the posted deadline.
toeic.example_zh: 請於公告期限前完成線上申請。

toeic.example_en: Fill out the application form completely and accurately.
toeic.example_zh: 請完整且準確地填寫申請表單。

toeic.example_en: Your personal statement should explain why you want this position.
toeic.example_zh: 您的個人陳述應說明為何想要這個職位。

toeic.example_en: Please submit a writing sample no longer than three pages.
toeic.example_zh: 請提交不超過三頁的寫作樣本。

toeic.example_en: Designers should submit a portfolio showcasing their best work.
toeic.example_zh: 設計師應提交展示其最佳作品的作品集。

toeic.example_en: Software engineers may be asked to share a code sample.
toeic.example_zh: 軟體工程師可能被要求分享程式碼樣本。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 帶回家完成的題目
toeic.example_en: Complete the take-home assignment within five business days.
toeic.example_zh: 請於五個工作日內完成帶回家的題目。

toeic.example_en: Candidates complete a 90-minute coding challenge before the interview.
toeic.example_zh: 候選人於面試前完成 90 分鐘的程式挑戰題。

toeic.example_en: The whiteboard interview tests problem-solving skills in real time.
toeic.example_zh: 白板面試即時測試解決問題的能力。

toeic.example_en: Pair programming is sometimes used to evaluate candidates collaboratively.
toeic.example_zh: 結對程式設計有時用於協作評估候選人。

toeic.example_en: The onsite interview lasts a full day and includes lunch with the team.
toeic.example_zh: 現場面試為期一整天，包含與團隊共進午餐。

toeic.example_en: You have been selected for a second interview with the hiring manager.
toeic.example_zh: 您已被選中與用人主管進行第二輪面試。

toeic.example_en: The final round typically includes meeting with senior leadership.
toeic.example_zh: 最後一輪通常包含與高階領導層的會面。

toeic.example_en: Try to meet the decision-maker during the final interview round.
toeic.example_zh: 請設法在最後一輪面試中與決策者見面。

toeic.example_en: She received a verbal offer over the phone followed by a written confirmation.
toeic.example_zh: 她透過電話獲得口頭錄取，隨後收到書面確認。

toeic.example_en: The written offer details all terms of employment.
toeic.example_zh: 書面錄取通知詳列所有僱用條款。

toeic.example_en: Offer rescission is rare but possible if background checks reveal issues.
toeic.example_zh: 撤回錄取雖然罕見，但若背景調查發現問題仍可能發生。

toeic.example_en: Understanding reasons for declined offers helps improve our recruiting process.
toeic.example_zh: 了解婉拒錄取的原因有助於改善我們的招募流程。

toeic.example_en: Successful salary negotiation requires research and confidence.
toeic.example_zh: 成功的薪資協商需要事前研究與信心。

toeic.example_en: Annual compensation reviews ensure pay remains competitive.
toeic.example_zh: 年度薪酬檢視確保薪資維持競爭力。

toeic.example_en: Your annual review meeting is scheduled for next Friday.
toeic.example_zh: 您的年度績效檢視會議排定於下週五。

toeic.example_en: The mid-year review is an opportunity to recalibrate goals.
toeic.example_zh: 期中檢視是重新校準目標的好機會。

toeic.example_en: Complete your self-assessment before your manager finalizes your review.
toeic.example_zh: 請在主管完成您的績效評估前完成自我評量。

toeic.example_en: The manager review provides feedback on the past year's performance.
toeic.example_zh: 主管評估針對過去一年的績效提供回饋。

toeic.example_en: Performance ratings range from below expectations to exceptional.
toeic.example_zh: 績效評等從低於期望到卓越不等。

toeic.example_en: She received a rating of exceeds expectations for the second year in a row.
toeic.example_zh: 她連續第二年獲得超出期望的評等。

toeic.example_en: Meets expectations indicates solid performance against established goals.
toeic.example_zh: 符合期望表示針對既定目標達成穩定的績效。

toeic.example_en: A needs improvement rating triggers a formal development plan.
toeic.example_zh: 需要改進的評等會觸發正式發展計畫。

toeic.example_en: Talent calibration meetings align ratings across managers.
toeic.example_zh: 人才校準會議調整各主管間的評等一致性。

toeic.example_en: Forced ranking systems require managers to distribute ratings on a curve.
toeic.example_zh: 強制排名制度要求主管依分佈曲線給予評等。

toeic.example_en: Stack ranking has fallen out of favor in many modern organizations.
toeic.example_zh: 堆疊排名在許多現代組織中已不受青睞。

toeic.example_en: The bell curve distribution forces ratings into predetermined percentages.
toeic.example_zh: 鐘形曲線分佈將評等強制套入既定百分比。

toeic.example_en: Continuous feedback replaces the traditional annual review in some companies.
toeic.example_zh: 持續性回饋在部分公司取代了傳統的年度評估。

toeic.example_en: Real-time feedback helps employees adjust their performance immediately.
toeic.example_zh: 即時回饋能協助員工立即調整其績效。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 上行回饋 (員工給主管)
toeic.example_en: Upward feedback gives managers insight into how their teams perceive them.
toeic.example_zh: 上行回饋讓主管了解團隊對其的看法。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 下行回饋 (主管給員工)
toeic.example_en: Downward feedback should be specific, timely, and actionable.
toeic.example_zh: 下行回饋應具體、及時且可付諸行動。

toeic.example_en: Peer feedback adds perspective beyond what managers can observe.
toeic.example_zh: 同儕回饋提供主管無法觀察到的觀點。

toeic.example_en: A strong feedback culture supports continuous learning and growth.
toeic.example_zh: 強健的回饋文化支持持續學習與成長。

toeic.example_en: Some leadership positions include a psychological assessment in the hiring process.
toeic.example_zh: 部分領導職位的招募流程包含心理評估。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) Myers-Briggs 性格類型指標 (MBTI)
toeic.example_en: Many organizations use Myers-Briggs to support team development.
toeic.example_zh: 許多組織利用 Myers-Briggs 支持團隊發展。

toeic.example_en: The DISC assessment identifies behavioral preferences in work styles.
toeic.example_zh: DISC 行為評估找出工作風格上的行為偏好。

toeic.example_en: StrengthsFinder helps employees identify their top natural talents.
toeic.example_zh: 優勢發掘評估協助員工找出其最佳的天賦才能。

toeic.example_en: An emotional intelligence assessment can guide leadership development.
toeic.example_zh: 情緒智商評估可指引領導力發展方向。

toeic.example_en: Leadership assessment results inform our succession planning.
toeic.example_zh: 領導力評估結果有助於我們的接班規劃。

toeic.example_en: The team assessment revealed strengths in collaboration but gaps in decision-making.
toeic.example_zh: 團隊評估顯示協作能力為優勢，但決策能力有所不足。

toeic.example_en: Our engagement index improved by 12 points after implementing new initiatives.
toeic.example_zh: 在實施新計畫後，我們的敬業度指數提升了 12 分。

toeic.example_en: Our employee net promoter score measures willingness to recommend us as an employer.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的員工淨推薦值衡量員工推薦本公司為雇主的意願。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 員工淨推薦值 (employee net promoter score)
toeic.example_en: Our eNPS rose to plus 45 this quarter, indicating strong loyalty.
toeic.example_zh: 本季我們的 eNPS 上升至正 45，顯示員工忠誠度高。

toeic.example_en: Analyzing exit data helps identify retention issues.
toeic.example_zh: 分析離職資料有助於找出留任問題。

toeic.example_en: Our retention rate improved to 92 percent this year.
toeic.example_zh: 我們今年的留任率提升至 92%。

toeic.example_en: First-year turnover is a key indicator of onboarding effectiveness.
toeic.example_zh: 第一年離職率是入職培訓成效的關鍵指標。

toeic.example_en: Retaining high performers is critical to our continued success.
toeic.example_zh: 留住高績效者對我們持續成功至關重要。

toeic.example_en: Managers work closely with low performers on improvement plans.
toeic.example_zh: 主管會與低績效者密切合作制定改善計畫。

toeic.example_en: Addressing underperformers fairly and promptly improves overall team morale.
toeic.example_zh: 公正且迅速地處理表現不佳者能提升整體團隊士氣。

toeic.example_en: Every team has its star employees who consistently exceed expectations.
toeic.example_zh: 每個團隊都有持續超越期望的明星員工。

toeic.example_en: High-potential employees are identified and developed for future leadership.
toeic.example_zh: 公司會找出高潛力員工並培育其成為未來領導者。

toeic.example_en: Internal talent mobility helps employees grow without leaving the company.
toeic.example_zh: 內部人才流動性協助員工在不離職的情況下成長。

toeic.example_en: The career framework defines paths for both technical and management tracks.
toeic.example_zh: 職涯架構為技術與管理軌道皆訂定發展路徑。

toeic.example_en: Some employees prefer the management track while others choose the technical track.
toeic.example_zh: 部分員工偏好管理職軌，其他人則選擇技術職軌。

toeic.example_en: The technical track allows engineers to advance without becoming managers.
toeic.example_zh: 技術職軌讓工程師可在不擔任主管的情況下晉升。

toeic.example_en: Our dual career ladder rewards both management and individual contributor paths.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的雙軌職涯同時獎勵管理與個別貢獻者兩條路徑。

toeic.example_en: The competency model defines required skills at each career level.
toeic.example_zh: 職能模型定義各職涯層級所需的技能。

toeic.example_en: The skill matrix shows current capabilities across the team.
toeic.example_zh: 技能矩陣呈現整個團隊目前的能力分布。

toeic.example_en: Capability building investments yield long-term organizational benefits.
toeic.example_zh: 能力建構的投資為組織帶來長期效益。

toeic.example_en: We maintain a succession candidate pool for every critical role.
toeic.example_zh: 我們為每個關鍵職位維持接班候選人池。

toeic.example_en: The talent council meets quarterly to review high-potential employees.
toeic.example_zh: 人才委員會每季開會檢視高潛力員工。

toeic.example_en: The two-year rotational program exposes new hires to multiple functions.
toeic.example_zh: 為期兩年的輪調計畫讓新進員工接觸多個職能。

toeic.example_en: Our global rotation program sends employees to offices in three countries.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的全球輪調計畫將員工派至三個國家的辦公室。

toeic.example_en: The leadership academy combines coursework with practical leadership experience.
toeic.example_zh: 領導力學院結合課程與實務領導經驗。

toeic.example_en: Our mentor matching algorithm pairs participants based on goals and expertise.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的導師媒合演算法依目標與專業配對參與者。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 反向導師制 (年輕者指導年長者)
toeic.example_en: Reverse mentoring helps senior leaders learn from younger employees.
toeic.example_zh: 反向導師制讓資深領導者向年輕員工學習。

toeic.example_en: Group mentoring sessions allow multiple mentees to learn from one mentor.
toeic.example_zh: 團體輔導會議讓多位被輔導者向一位導師學習。

toeic.example_en: Peer mentoring connects employees at similar career stages.
toeic.example_zh: 同儕輔導將處於相似職涯階段的員工互相連結。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 高階主管贊助計畫
toeic.example_en: Sponsorship programs pair underrepresented talent with senior advocates.
toeic.example_zh: 贊助計畫將少數族群人才與資深倡議者配對。

toeic.example_en: Each employee resource group has a senior executive sponsor.
toeic.example_zh: 每個員工資源團體都有一位資深高階主管贊助人。

toeic.example_en: Having a senior advocate can accelerate career development significantly.
toeic.example_zh: 擁有資深倡議者能顯著加速職涯發展。

toeic.example_en: Allyship training helps employees support colleagues from different backgrounds.
toeic.example_zh: 盟友支持訓練協助員工支援來自不同背景的同事。

toeic.example_en: Cultural awareness training helps global teams collaborate more effectively.
toeic.example_zh: 文化覺察訓練協助全球團隊更有效協作。

toeic.example_en: A global mindset is essential for leaders in multinational organizations.
toeic.example_zh: 全球化思維對跨國組織的領導者至關重要。

toeic.example_en: Cross-cultural communication skills reduce misunderstandings on global teams.
toeic.example_zh: 跨文化溝通技巧能減少全球團隊間的誤會。

toeic.example_en: Time zone differences require careful meeting scheduling for global teams.
toeic.example_zh: 全球團隊需仔細安排會議以因應時差問題。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 日不落模式 (24 小時接力工作)
toeic.example_en: The follow-the-sun model ensures around-the-clock support across regions.
toeic.example_zh: 日不落模式確保跨區域全天候支援。

toeic.example_en: Translation services help overcome language barriers in global meetings.
toeic.example_zh: 翻譯服務協助克服全球會議中的語言隔閡。

toeic.example_en: Real-time translation services improve communication across language groups.
toeic.example_zh: 即時翻譯服務改善跨語言族群間的溝通。

toeic.example_en: The global headquarters coordinates strategy across all regional offices.
toeic.example_zh: 全球總部協調所有區域辦公室的策略。

toeic.example_en: The regional manager oversees operations across five countries.
toeic.example_zh: 區域經理督導五個國家的營運。

toeic.example_en: The country manager represents the company in all local markets.
toeic.example_zh: 國家經理在所有當地市場代表公司。

toeic.example_en: The expat package includes housing, school fees, and home leave travel.
toeic.example_zh: 外派配套包含住宿、學費與返鄉假旅費。

toeic.example_en: Expatriates receive home leave travel allowance once per year.
toeic.example_zh: 外派人員每年可獲一次返鄉假旅費津貼。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 稅務平衡 (外派稅務調整)
toeic.example_en: Tax equalization ensures expatriates pay no more tax than they would at home.
toeic.example_zh: 稅務平衡確保外派人員的稅負不超過其在母國的水準。

toeic.example_en: Successful repatriation requires planning for the employee's return role.
toeic.example_zh: 成功的返國安排需要為員工歸國後的職位進行規劃。

toeic.example_en: International assignments typically last between two and four years.
toeic.example_zh: 國際任務通常為期二至四年。

toeic.example_en: A short-term assignment lasts from three to twelve months.
toeic.example_zh: 短期外派任務為期三個月至十二個月。

toeic.example_en: A business visa is required for short trips that involve client meetings.
toeic.example_zh: 涉及客戶會議的短期出差需要商務簽證。

toeic.example_en: Permanent residents can work in the country without additional sponsorship.
toeic.example_zh: 永久居民可在該國工作而無需額外擔保。

toeic.example_en: Naturalization grants citizenship after meeting residency requirements.
toeic.example_zh: 在符合居留要求後可透過入籍歸化取得公民身分。

toeic.example_en: Our immigration attorney handles all visa applications for foreign hires.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的移民律師處理所有外籍員工的簽證申請。

toeic.example_en: Verify your work authorization documents before your start date.
toeic.example_zh: 請於報到日前確認您的工作授權文件。
